tasks.title: Prepare Odoo integration transition

tasks.title: Stabilize pending OAuth/Odoo changes for publication
tasks.description: Validate local Claude changes, fix build/deployment regressions, run functional checks, and publish the branch safely.
evidence: Audited OAuth environment dependencies across lib/google-login.ts, lib/google-oauth.ts, admin OAuth routes, .env.example, and Termux/Cloudflare operational docs
Added context/operations/android_cloudflare_oauth_environment.md with exact Android Termux + Cloudflare Tunnel + Google OAuth runtime requirements
Added memory/current/blockers.md and refreshed memory/current/now.md with the active OAuth runtime mismatch and restart requirements
Validated google-login unit coverage after environment-hardening changes
Connected to the Android production host over SSH, corrected the runtime .env values, rebuilt with NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=2048, and restarted the galantesjewelry service successfully
Verified production OAuth start routes now emit the correct Google redirect_uri values for both public and admin flows
Added tests/e2e/admin_google_oauth_smoke.py and passed Selenium browser validation against the live public and admin domains

tasks.title: Recover failed April 28 production deploy on GCP
tasks.description: Restore Cloudflare tunnel, production CMS/integrations data, Odoo health, and rebuild the live web app from the current VM source.
evidence: Recovered production Cloudflare tunnel by restoring the complete .env.prod backup on the GCP VM and bringing up cloudflared first.
Recreated production Postgres/Odoo service state and verified odoo container returned to healthy status.
Restored CMS and integrations snapshots plus managed home/logo/favicon blobs on the VM and in galante_cms_settings so social links and cover assets survived restarts.
Hardened production web rebuilds by adding NODE_OPTIONS heap sizing in Dockerfile and excluding _codex_stage from .dockerignore.
Rebuilt the production web container from current VM source and verified the shop sidebar filters layout is live again.
Validated public home, /shop, admin login, and Odoo with HTTP checks plus Selenium functional smoke on April 28, 2026.

tasks.title: Repair post-recovery shop regressions and revalidate production
tasks.description: Fix production shop interaction and PDP image issues, then run Selenium verification across the live environment.
evidence: Moved shop sorting, category filters, and pagination to direct URL navigation so production filtering works reliably again.
Aligned PDP product gallery image delivery with the direct product image route to eliminate the failing _next/image optimization path.
Disabled browser extensions inside the cloned Selenium runtime profile to prevent third-party content scripts from contaminating production verification.
Passed Selenium production verification on April 28, 2026 across home, shop, contact, bridal, collections, PDP, and /api/health with zero failed checks.

tasks.title: Restore Google OAuth owner connection and production Calendar routing
tasks.description: Reproduce the failing Google OAuth reconnection flow with the operational Chrome profile, fix the callback/token exchange path, restore the production calendar ID, and verify live Calendar creation on the CEO calendar.
evidence: Reproduced the exact Google OAuth policy error with Selenium using the persistent cloned Chrome Profile 9 runtime.
Fixed the admin OAuth callback so token exchange always uses the live request-derived redirect URI instead of a percent-encoded cookie value.
Completed production owner OAuth reconnection and persisted a fresh encrypted refresh token in data/integrations.json.
Restored production appointments.googleCalendarId to ceo@galantesjewelry.com from the admin panel.
Adjusted Calendar auth selection to prefer the configured service account for Calendar operations while keeping owner OAuth available for Gmail API mail delivery.
Validated with Selenium that /api/admin/verify-calendar returned success and produced an event whose decoded eid targets ceo@galantesjewelry.com.

tasks.title: Harden customer account redirects
tasks.description: Prevent blank account pages by redirecting unauthenticated users from /account/orders, /account/invoices, and order detail pages back to the login flow.
evidence: Updated app/account/orders/page.tsx, app/account/invoices/page.tsx, and app/account/orders/[id]/page.tsx to redirect unauthenticated users to /auth/login with the matching returnTo target.
Added tests/unit/app/account/account-pages.test.ts to verify the three redirect paths.
Rebuilt production web and verified the live /account redirects still return HTTP 307.

tasks.title: Remove invalid Odoo CMS field lookup
tasks.description: Stop the frontend Odoo settings client from requesting the missing shop_hero_image_url field and keep the local shop hero fallback intact.
evidence: Removed shop_hero_image_url from the galante.cms.settings field list in lib/odoo/services.ts.
Added tests/unit/lib/odoo-services.test.ts to verify the client no longer requests the missing field.
Rebuilt production web and confirmed the Odoo Invalid field warning no longer appears in recent logs.

tasks.title: Integrate secure shipping selection in checkout
tasks.description: Expose carrier selection in checkout, recalculate insured shipping server-side, and persist the chosen shipping service into Odoo/Stripe.
evidence: Added ShippingSelector to app/checkout/page.tsx and wired the selected carrier into the Stripe checkout request.
Updated app/api/checkout/stripe/route.ts to validate the selected carrier on the server, recalculate insurance-based shipping, and add a shipping service line to the Odoo order.
Added an internal Galantes Secure Shipping service product in the Odoo addon so order totals match Stripe and the selected shipping service is recorded.
Hardened app/api/shipping/rates/route.ts and app/api/checkout/stripe/route.ts with a fast fallback when CMS settings are slow to hydrate from Odoo.
Validated with vitest, TypeScript, next build, and Selenium smoke on the local checkout flow using Profile 9.

tasks.title: Repair broken skill reference paths and shared docs

Added missing skill reference docs for onboarding-cro, page-cro, paywall-upgrade-cro, programmatic-seo, seo-audit, email-sequence, competitor-alternatives, and code-to-prd.
Fixed stale relative links in c-level-advisor, engineering-skills, marketing-skills, pm-skills, ra-qm-skills, security-pen-testing, vercel-react-best-practices, and competitor-alternatives.

tasks.title: Harden Odoo JSON-2 retry behavior for 404 responses
tasks.description: Treat missing Odoo JSON-2 resources as non-retryable errors and add a regression test so sync calls fail fast on 404.
evidence: Updated src/config/odooClient.js to stop retrying 404 responses alongside 401/403 and config errors.
Added a unit regression test proving Odoo 404 responses fail fast after a single fetch attempt.
Validated the targeted Odoo unit test suite with vitest.

tasks.title: Add structured Odoo sync diagnostics
tasks.description: Emit structured logs for appointment Odoo sync outcomes and cover the failure path with a unit test so sync problems are easier to audit.
evidence: Updated lib/appointment-flow.ts to log structured Odoo sync success, skip, and failure diagnostics.
Added tests/unit/lib/appointment-flow.test.ts to cover the structured failure log path.
Validated the change with focused Vitest coverage and the repo lint task.

tasks.title: Preserve runtime data during GCP repo sync
tasks.description: Backup and restore the live data/ tree around the VM git reset so production content and operational state survive code syncs.
evidence: Updated scripts/gcp/02-push-to-vm.sh to back up data/ on the VM before git reset --hard and restore it after the sync finishes.
Added an EXIT trap so the backup is restored even if the sync fails partway through.
Validated the modified GCP shell scripts with bash -n using Git Bash.

tasks.title: Create rollback backup of GCP production
tasks.description: Capture a predeploy backup of the live GCP stack, including database, persistent volumes, app data, and runtime logs, so production can be rolled back if the next change fails.
evidence: Ran scripts/backup/predeploy-backup.sh on the GCP VM at /home/yoeli/galantesjewelry with ENV_FILE=.env.gcp and COMPOSE_FILE=docker-compose.gcp.yml.
Used sudo and an absolute BACKUP_BASE_DIR so Docker could snapshot the live postgres-data and odoo-data volumes without permission or mount-path errors.
Verified the backup directory /home/yoeli/galantesjewelry/backups/predeploy/20260501_023923 contains galantes_db.sql, postgres-data.tgz, odoo-data.tgz, app-data.tgz, and runtime logs/inspects.

tasks.title: Promote runtime changes to GCP production

Validated that galantes_web is healthy and https://galantesjewelry.com/api/health returned ok.

tasks.title: Protect customer addresses route with auth guard
tasks.description: Add the missing customer-session redirect to /account/addresses so the customer options menu cannot land on an unprotected account screen.
evidence: Added a customer-session guard to app/account/addresses/page.tsx so unauthenticated users are redirected to /auth/login?returnTo=/account/addresses.
Extended tests/unit/app/account/account-pages.test.ts with an addresses redirect regression test.
Validated the focused account-page test suite and repo lint.

tasks.title: Preserve returnTo through customer login
tasks.description: Make the customer login links remember the current URL so users return to the page they were on after signing in.
evidence: Added lib/customer-navigation.ts with buildCustomerLoginHref so customer login links preserve the current path and query string.
Updated components/Navbar.tsx to use the current pathname/search params for both desktop and mobile customer login links.
Added tests/unit/lib/customer-navigation.test.ts to cover cart return behavior and auth-page loop prevention.
Validated the focused tests and repo lint.

tasks.title: Make customer sessions durable until logout
tasks.description: Extend the customer session lifetime so authenticated customer sections remain available until the user explicitly signs out.
evidence: Updated lib/customer-auth.ts to reuse the long-lived Google session max age and set customer JWT expiry to the matching far-future date.
Added a customer-auth regression test covering token sign/verify for durable sessions.
Validated the customer auth, customer navigation, and account redirect test suites plus repo lint.

tasks.title: Verify customer login returnTo with Selenium QA
tasks.description: Run a real Selenium functional check against the current code to confirm the customer login link returns to the cart and logout blocks protected account pages.
evidence: Added scripts/verify_customer_login_return_to_profile9.py to exercise the cart -> login -> cart flow and confirm logout blocks /account/orders.
Started a local Next.js dev server on 127.0.0.1:3001 and ran the Selenium QA against the current code.
Validated the login link preserved returnTo=/cart, registration returned to /cart, logout returned home, and /account/orders redirected back to login after logout.
Captured browser console logs during the QA run, including the expected Odoo fallback warnings and the returnTo debug output.

tasks.title: Centralize account auth guard and harden returnTo sanitization
tasks.description: Move the customer account protection into the account layout and reject auth-page returnTo values so customer navigation cannot bounce through logout or other auth routes.
evidence: Updated app/account/layout.tsx to redirect unauthenticated users from the shared account layout instead of relying only on page-level guards.
Shared sanitizeCustomerReturnTo in lib/customer-navigation.ts and hardened it to reject /auth routes before login returns the user.
Updated app/auth/login/page.tsx to use the shared sanitizer and added regression tests for the account layout and auth-path returnTo handling.
Validated the targeted Vitest suites, repo lint, and a real Selenium QA run against http://127.0.0.1:3001 with browser console logs reviewed.

tasks.title: Migrate Next interceptors and redeploy production invoices flow
tasks.description: Move the request header logic to Next 16 proxy.ts, fix the GCP deploy scripts for the live stack, and verify the customer invoices route in production after the restart.
evidence: Replaced middleware.ts with proxy.ts so Next 16 builds without the middleware/proxy conflict while still injecting x-current-url for customer navigation.

Hardened scripts/gcp/lib/common.sh, scripts/gcp/02-push-to-vm.sh, and scripts/gcp/04-start-stack.sh so GCP deploys handle .env.gcp safely, use the correct VM repo path, and restart only the actual compose services.
Synced the codex/preserve-env-2026-04-30 branch to the production VM, rebuilt the web image successfully, and restarted the live stack.
Ran a real Selenium check against https://galantesjewelry.com that injected a production customer_session cookie and confirmed /account/invoices loads without redirecting to /auth/login.
